title: Master Direction – Reserve Bank of India (Access Criteria for NDS-OM) Directions, 2025
description:
The RBI revised access criteria by shifting application processes to the PRAVAAH portal. The ruling emphasizes digital compliance, transparency, and streamlined access to the government securities platform.
The post Master Direction – Reserve Bank of India (Access Criteria for NDS-OM) Directions, 2025 appeared first on TaxGuru.
